title: beval Run Result
description: Schema for beval evaluation run results output per SPEC §12.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run completed.

mode.description: Evaluation mode used for this run.

config.description: Non-sensitive configuration values used for this run.

summary.description: Aggregate summary of all case results.

EvaluationMode.description: Evaluation mode controlling which grader layers are active.

Score.description: A normalized score in the range 0.0 to 1.0.

MetricCategory.description: Named quality dimension for score grouping.

GraderLayer.description: The grader layer that produced this grade.

RunConfig.description: Non-sensitive configuration snapshot for the run.

grade_pass_threshold.description: Threshold above which a grade passes.

case_pass_threshold.description: Threshold at or above which a case passes.

metric_weights.description: Per-metric weights for weighted score aggregation.

active_layers.description: Explicitly active grader layers; null to use mode defaults.

RunSummary.description: Aggregate summary across all cases in the run.

overall_score.description: Mean of all case overall scores (excluding errored cases).

errored.description: Number of cases that errored during execution.

metrics.description: Per-metric average scores across all cases.

Grade.description: Result of executing one grader against a case.

criterion.description: The then-clause text that triggered this grader.

metric.description: Metric category for this grade (e.g., latency, quality).

passed.description: Whether the score exceeded the grade pass threshold.

detail.description: Human-readable detail about the grading result.

layer.description: Which grader layer produced this grade.

skipped.description: Whether the grader was skipped due to evaluation mode.

stage.description: One-based stage index for multi-stage cases; null for single-stage.

stage_name.description: When-clause text for this stage; null for single-stage cases.

score.description: Mean of grade scores within this stage.

passed.description: Whether all grades in this stage passed.

grade_count.description: Number of grades in this stage.

TrialResult.description: Result of a single trial execution.

CaseResult.description: Aggregated evaluation result for a single case.

category.description: Category grouping for filtering and reporting.

overall_score.description: Arithmetic mean of all grade scores in this case.

passed.description: Whether the overall score met the case pass threshold.

metric_scores.description: Per-metric average scores within this case.

error.description: Error message if the case errored during execution; null otherwise.

grades.description: Individual grade results from each grader.

stages.description: Per-stage summaries; present only for multi-stage cases.

trials.description: Number of trials executed for this case.

score_stddev.description: Standard deviation of overall scores across trials; null for single-trial runs.

score_min.description: Minimum overall score across trials; null for single-trial runs.

score_max.description: Maximum overall score across trials; null for single-trial runs.

pass_rate.description: Fraction of trials that passed (e.g., '4/5'); null for single-trial runs.

per_trial.description: Per-trial results; present only when trials > 1.
